Thunderbolt.description: Electric blast. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). Requires line of sight.

Electro Web.description: Electric web. AOE radius 1. Places web terrain that applies -1 Speed stage on field entry. Requires line of sight.

Shadow Ball.description: Ghost energy projectile. Single target, range 4. 20% chance to lower target's Sp. Def by 1 stage.

Flamethrower.description: Fire blast. Single target, range 4. Damage boosted by Sunny Day, reduced by Rain Dance.

Psychic.description: Psychic force blast. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). 10% chance to lower target's Sp. Def. Requires line of sight.

Moonblast.description: Fairy power drawn from moonlight. Single target, range 4. 30% chance to lower target's Sp. Atk by 1.

Aura Sphere.description: Focused aura blast. Single target, range 4. Never misses. Bypasses barriers and fog.

Sludge Bomb.description: Poison sludge thrown at a single target, range 3. 30% chance to poison (applies burn_zone-style damage to target tile for 2 turns).

Air Slash.description: Air blade slash. Single target, range 5. Bypasses barriers and fog. 30% chance to skip target's movement phase next turn (flinch).

Dark Pulse.description: Dark energy wave. Single target, range 4. 20% chance to flinch (skip target's movement phase next turn). Requires line of sight.

Focus Blast.description: Maximum power fighting energy sphere. Single target, range 5. 70% accuracy — high risk, massive reward. Requires line of sight.

Hex.description: Ghost attack. Single target, range 3. Power DOUBLES to 130 if the target is currently standing on a status terrain tile (burn_zone, poison_trap, slow_zone, resonance_zone). Pairs devastatingly with Gengar's other moves.

Discharge.description: Electric discharge. AOE radius 1 (7 tiles). 30% chance to paralyze targets hit. Requires line of sight.
